# LAError.Code.appCancel

**Case**

The app canceled authentication.

## Declaration

```swift
case appCancel
```

## Discussion

You receive this error if you call the [doc://com.apple.localauthentication/documentation/LocalAuthentication/LAContext/invalidate()] method while authentication is in process.

## Cancellation

- **LAError.Code.systemCancel**: The system canceled authentication.
- **LAError.Code.userCancel**: The user tapped the cancel button in the authentication dialog.

items.description: The user tapped the cancel button in the authentication dialog.
